description: As Support Director at a telecommunications company, bring all support cases in SuiteCRM into compliance with company policy following the departure of the escalation manager. Classify any case describing a service outage, system failure, or disruption affecting more than 500 users or endpoints as P1 (High) priority. For every P1 case open for more than 7 days, update the description with an escalation note beginning with '[ESCALATION REVIEW]' documenting the current situation and recommended next steps. Additionally, change the status of any P1 case from 'Open_New' to 'Open_Assigned'. Do not escalate cases that do not meet the impact threshold.

metadata.contamination_case: PDF export font rendering issue for 3 internal users
